domain: Etruscan buon-fresco preservation (wet lime plaster absorbs pigment; CO2 carbonation over hours-to-days locks pigment in crystalline CaCO3 matrix; post-carbonation matrix is immutable)
specific_mechanism: Hard time-bounded write window followed by chemical crystallization commits absorbed content permanently.
llm_application: TGCCLCW: continual-learning protocol with wet trainable buffer (mutable adapters) writable only during fixed commit window; at end-of-window, carbonation pass absorbs consistent-gradient parameters into base via low-rank update, rejects inconsistent. Buffer resets after.
novelty_claim: MemoryBench (2510.17281), CL Generative AI Survey (2506.13045), MoE-CL (2509.18133) cover CL paradigms. None retrieve hard time-bounded commit window + gradient-consistency absorption-or-reject crystallization pass.
